task_description: Open community recommendations, set and save review filters and preferences, then browse the filtered recommendations list.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the top navigation bar of the Steam store page, with a semitransparent red X centered on the Chinese menu item labeled “推荐” with a small downward arrow, indicating a toolbar/menu control in the top area. In the full-screen view, the Steam client is open on the store homepage in Chinese, showing the main featured banner for “Slay the Spire 2,” a search bar near the top, and other navigation items such as 浏览 and 类别 around the targeted menu.
caption.action: Click the “推荐” top navigation dropdown menu.
caption.expectation: The recommendation menu should open as a dropdown, or the menu item should become active/selected.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a dark dropdown panel opened beneath the top navigation, with a semitransparent red X centered on the menu item labeled “社区推荐.” Nearby items in the same list include “您的探索队列,” “新品队列,” “交互式推荐模型,” “好友中热门,” and “Steam 鉴赏家.” In the full-screen view, this is the Steam store homepage in Chinese with the “推荐” top menu expanded; the click target is a menu option in the open dropdown under the top toolbar area.
caption.action: Click the “社区推荐” option in the open 推荐 dropdown menu.
caption.expectation: That recommendation option should become selected, and Steam should navigate to or load the Community Recommendations page while the dropdown closes.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a blue rectangular button labeled “筛选条件及选项” with a small downward arrow on its right side, and the semitransparent red X is centered directly on this button. In the full-screen view, the Steam client is on the Chinese “社区推荐” page, with this button positioned near the top of the main content area above the list of recommended games and reviews. This is a UI control in the page content area.
caption.action: Click the blue “筛选条件及选项” dropdown button.
caption.expectation: A filter/options panel or dropdown should open so the recommendation list can be refined, and the button should become active.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the date filter section labeled “按日期筛选,” with three radio-button options: “昨日撰写,” “上周撰写,” and “上个月撰写.” The semitransparent red X is centered on the middle option, “上周撰写,” indicating that exact radio choice. In the full-screen view, the Steam client is on the “社区推荐” page with the expanded filter panel open in the main content area. This target is a UI control within the page’s filter settings panel, alongside other filtering groups for playtime, language, tags, and exclusions.
caption.action: Click the “上周撰写” radio option in the date filter section.
caption.expectation: The “上周撰写” option should become selected, updating the date filter choice and likely refreshing or preparing the recommendation list to show reviews written in the past week.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the language filter section labeled “按语言筛选,” with two radio options: “全部语言” and “您的语言,” plus a blue “自定义” button below. The semitransparent red X is centered on the “全部语言” radio option, indicating that exact selectable control. In the full-screen view, the Steam client is on the Chinese “社区推荐” page with the filter panel expanded in the main content area. The target is a UI control inside the filter settings panel, alongside date, playtime, tag, exclusion, and other recommendation filter options.
caption.action: Click the “全部语言” radio option in the language filter section.
caption.expectation: The language filter should switch to “全部语言,” updating the selected radio button and likely refreshing or preparing the recommendations to include all languages.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a bright blue rectangular button labeled “保存为默认偏好,” with the semitransparent red X centered on the button, indicating that exact clickable control. In the full-screen view, Steam is open to the Chinese “社区推荐” page with the recommendation filter panel expanded; the same blue button appears near the bottom of the filter panel above the “隐藏筛选条件及选项” button and below the filter settings sections.
caption.action: Click the blue “保存为默认偏好” button.
caption.expectation: The current filter selections should be saved as the default preferences, and the page may show a brief confirmation or keep the same panel state with the saved settings applied.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a bright blue rectangular button labeled “隐藏筛选条件及选项,” with a semitransparent red X centered on it, marking that exact clickable UI control. In the full-screen view, Steam is open to the Chinese “社区推荐” page with the recommendation filter panel expanded in the center; the same blue button sits near the bottom-left of the filter panel, below the save-preferences area and above the recommendation content.
caption.action: Click the blue “隐藏筛选条件及选项” button.
caption.expectation: The expanded filter panel should collapse or be hidden, changing the page layout to show more of the recommendation content and likely replacing the button with an option to show the filters again.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image frames the entire Steam window with no semitransparent red X, indicating a scroll action rather than a click. The visible page is the Chinese Steam Community Recommendations page titled “社区推荐,” showing a blue “筛选条件及选项” button near the top of the content area, a large featured recommendation card for “MIMESIS” with artwork on the left and a review panel on the right, and the top portion of another recommendation card below. In the full-screen context, the Steam client remains on the same recommendations page with the page content centered and a vertical scrollbar at the far right, so the scroll applies to the main page content.
caption.action: Scroll down on the main recommendations page.
caption.expectation: The list of recommendation cards should move upward, revealing more items farther down the Community Recommendations page.
